prompt: A 15-second Hollywood haute couture fantasy film in 8K photorealistic quality, with a high-fashion editorial style and Unreal Engine 5 fluid rendering, featuring visual illusions. The scene is set on an endless salt flat mirror reflecting the sky, with oppressive dark clouds above and a minimalist cool-toned palette. [00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Haute couture entrance and porcelain skin. Camera position: extremely low-angle upward shot, using a telephoto lens to zoom in. Action: An Asian female model with a highly distinctive high-fashion face walks coolly across the water. Effect: Her dress is not made of fabric but of flowing liquid blue-and-white porcelain. As she walks, the skirt emits crisp clinking sounds like real ceramic, with a glossy surface and traditional blue patterns moving like living things across the white porcelain texture. [00:05-00:10] Shot 2: Physical shattering and ink arrival. Camera position: extreme close-up on the face, then quickly zooming out. Action: The model suddenly stops, coldly stares at the camera, and snaps her fingers crisply. Effect: At the snap, the blue-and-white porcelain dress does not fall but instantly shatters into thousands of highly realistic ink-wash swallows. These swallows, carrying real water droplets and ink marks, drag black fluid afterimages through the air, swirling wildly around her. [00:10-00:15] Shot 3: Dimensional dissolution and abyss reflection. Camera position: high-angle overhead shot, rapidly rotating and descending. Action: The flock of ink-wash swallows plunges into the mirror-like lake water beneath the model's feet. Effect: The originally solid salt lake surface instantly loses surface tension, and the entire highly realistic world begins to violently blur and dissolve like thick ink dripping into clear water. The real dark clouds and the model's figure transform into a grand 3D fluid ink vortex, completely engulfing the camera into a black-and-white abyss.
prompt_zh: 【风格】好莱坞奇幻高定大片(Hollywood Haute Couture Fantasy)，8K超清，真实摄影(Photorealistic)，顶级时尚杂志摄影感(High-fashion Editorial Style)，虚幻引擎5流体渲染，视觉错觉。 【时长】15秒 【场景】一面一望无际的真实天空之镜盐湖。天空是极具压迫感的乌云，地面像镜子一样完美倒映着一切，画面呈现极简的冷色调。 [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：高定登场与瓷器皮肤 机位：极低角度仰拍，超长焦镜头拉近。 动作：一名拥有极具辨识度的高级脸亚洲女模，迈着清冷的台步走在水面上。 特效：她身上穿的不是布料，而是一件由流动的真实青花瓷(Liquid Blue-and-White Porcelain)构成的长裙。随着她的步伐，裙摆像真实的陶瓷一样发出清脆的碰撞声，表面流光溢彩，青蓝色的传统花纹在白瓷质感的裙身上如同活物般游走。 [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：物理碎裂与水墨降临 机位：面部微距特写，跟焦极速拉远。 动作：女模突然停下脚步，冷冷地注视着镜头，打了一个清脆的响指。 特效：响指打响的瞬间，她身上的青花瓷长裙并没有掉落，而是瞬间炸裂成成千上万只极其逼真的水墨燕子(Photorealistic Ink-wash Swallows)。这些燕子带着真实的水滴和墨迹，在空气中拖拽出黑色的流体残影，疯狂地围绕着她旋转。 [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：维度溶解与深渊倒影 机位：高空俯拍，镜头极速旋转下降。 动作：水墨燕子群猛地扎入女模脚下的镜面湖水中。 特效：原本坚硬的盐湖水面瞬间失去了表面张力，整个极其写实的真实世界开始像滴入清水中的浓墨一样剧烈晕染、溶解。真实的乌云和女模的身影全部化作极其宏大的3D流体水墨漩涡(3D Fluid Ink Vortex)，将镜头彻底吞噬进一个黑白交织的深渊。

prompt: Live-action manga adaptation: Breathing Technique Showdown (15 seconds, super flashy special effects version)  [Core Highlights]: Water Breathing (blue water dragon) VS Thunder Breathing (golden lightning), a high-speed duel between real-life fighters.  [Style]: Hollywood live-action manga movie质感, dark samurai aesthetic, 4K ultra HD, fast-paced editing, explosive particle effects, no gore. [Duration]: 15 seconds [Setting]: A misty forest under moonlight, muddy ground, falling leaves.  [00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Water Prelude - Opening Stance (buildup) Visual: A young samurai wearing a green-and-black checkered haori (coat) lowers his center of gravity in the moonlight, gripping his sword with both hands. Action: He takes a deep breath, and the surrounding air instantly freezes. As he draws his blade, a massive blue water dragon, formed from high-pressure water currents, materializes out of nowhere, spinning rapidly around his body and sword, roaring like rushing water. Special Effects Details: The water flow has a realistic splash effect, illuminating the dark forest.  [00:05-00:10] Shot 2: Thunder Flash - Dash (speed) Visual: His opponent, a blond swordsman wearing a yellow triangular-patterned haori, crouches low, assuming an iaijutsu (quick-draw) stance. Action: The ground suddenly explodes, and he transforms into a blinding golden lightning afterimage, zigzagging through the trees at an imperceptible speed. Special Effects Details: Golden electric arcs and scorched leaves linger in the air where he passes.  [00:10-00:15] Shot 3: Water and Thunder Collision - Final Clash (ultimate move) Visual: A high-speed charge. The young samurai swings the massive blue water dragon downward, while the blond swordsman, transformed into lightning, charges head-on. Action: The two blades clash violently at the center of the frame. Special Effects Spectacle: The blue water dragon and golden lightning explode instantly, forming a massive water-and-thunder energy storm that expands outward. Nearby trees are snapped in half by the shockwave, and mud and light flood the frame. The scene ends in a dazzling burst of blue, yellow, and white light.
prompt_zh: 真人漫改·呼吸法决战（15秒·超燃特效版） 【核心看点】：水之呼吸（蓝色水龙） VS 雷之呼吸（金色闪电），真人极速对决。  【风格】：好莱坞真人漫改电影质感，暗黑武士风，4K超清，极速快剪，粒子光效炸裂，无血腥。 【时长】：15秒 【场景】：月光下的迷雾森林，地面泥泞，落叶纷飞。  [00:00-00:05] 镜头1：水调歌头·起式（蓄力感） 画面：一名身穿绿黑格子羽织（外套）的少年武士，在月光下压低重心，双手握刀。 动作：他深吸一口气，周围的空气瞬间凝固。随着他拔刀出鞘，一条巨大的、由高压水流凝聚而成的蓝色水龙凭空出现，环绕着他的身体和刀刃高速旋转，发出流水的轰鸣声。 特效细节：水流具有真实的水花飞溅感，照亮了黑暗的森林。  [00:05-00:10] 镜头2：雷霆一闪·突进（极速感） 画面：对面的对手，一名披着黄色三角纹羽织的金发剑客，身体压得极低，做出了居合斩（拔刀术）的姿势。 动作：地面突然炸裂，他整个人瞬间化作一道刺眼的金色雷电残影，以肉眼无法捕捉的速度在树林间呈“之”字形极速折射突进。 特效细节：经过的地方，空气中残留着金色的电弧和被烧焦的落叶。  [00:10-00:15] 镜头3：水雷交轰·绝响（大招对撞） 画面：极速对冲。少年武士挥舞着巨大的蓝色水龙迎面斩下，金发剑客化身雷电迎面撞上。 动作：两把刀在画面中心猛烈碰撞。 特效奇观：蓝色的水龙与金色的雷电瞬间炸开，形成一个巨大的水雷能量风暴向四周扩散。周围的大树被能量波拦腰震断，泥水和光芒遮蔽了镜头。画面在极致炫目的蓝黄白光中结束。

[Style]: Hollywood live-action manga movie质感, dark samurai aesthetic, 4K ultra HD, fast-paced editing, explosive particle effects, no gore. [Duration]: 15 seconds [Setting]: A misty forest under moonlight, muddy ground, falling leaves.  [00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Water Prelude - Opening Stance (buildup) Visual: A young samurai wearing a green-and-black checkered haori (coat) lowers his center of gravity in the moonlight, gripping his sword with both hands. Action: He takes a deep breath, and the surrounding air instantly freezes. As he draws his blade, a massive blue water dragon, formed from high-pressure water currents, materializes out of nowhere, spinning rapidly around his body and sword, roaring like rushing water. Special Effects Details: The water flow has a realistic splash effect, illuminating the dark forest.  [00:05-00:10] Shot 2: Thunder Flash - Dash (speed) Visual: His opponent, a blond swordsman wearing a yellow triangular-patterned haori, crouches low, assuming an iaijutsu (quick-draw) stance. Action: The ground suddenly explodes, and he transforms into a blinding golden lightning afterimage, zigzagging through the trees at an imperceptible speed. Special Effects Details: Golden electric arcs and scorched leaves linger in the air where he passes.  [00:10-00:15] Shot 3: Water and Thunder Collision - Final Clash (ultimate move) Visual: A high-speed charge. The young samurai swings the massive blue water dragon downward, while the blond swordsman, transformed into lightning, charges head-on. Action: The two blades clash violently at the center of the frame. Special Effects Spectacle: The blue water dragon and golden lightning explode instantly, forming a massive water-and-thunder energy storm that expands outward. Nearby trees are snapped in half by the shockwave, and mud and light flood the frame. The scene ends in a dazzling burst of blue, yellow, and white light.

prompt: 16:9 horizontal screen, street rap MV style, neon purple-blue cool tones, explosive and edgy atmosphere. 0-3 seconds: Medium shot moving forward, urban street night scene with neon flickering, an 80-year-old silver-haired grandmother stands before a graffiti wall, her short silver-white hair slicked back sharply, square face with distinct contours, slanted brows rising into her temples, eyes sharp as lightning, crow's feet like medals of time, a confident smile curling her lips, wearing a black leather jacket over a white printed T-shirt (with bold black 'YOLO' on the chest) + black cargo pants + white high-top sneakers, a thick gold chain around her neck, silver bracelet on her wrist, both hands raising a microphone, as the BGM's powerful beat kicks in, her eyes sharpen, lips part, and she begins to rap. 3-7 seconds: Switching between medium shots and close-ups, the grandmother starts rapping with intense rhythm, silver hair flying as she nods, one hand gripping the mic, the other gesturing to the beat—pointing a finger at the lens, chopping the rhythm with her palm, throwing hip-hop signs—movements fluid and seamless, eyes piercing directly into the camera, wrinkles leaping vividly with every expression, lips moving fast to spit the lyrics: [Rap Lyrics] 'At eighty, my legs can still out-jump you! Silver hair flying, this is my pride! Don't call me old, my flow's way better than yours, when you were rapping, I was still listening to disco!' (Fast tempo, strong rhythm, fierce attitude) Quick cuts: facial close-ups, hand movements, full-body sway, side silhouette, all synced to the BGM beats. 7-11 seconds: Dance segment, camera pulls back to show full body, the grandmother starts dancing—first a classic hip-hop bounce, then a sharp street dance freeze, followed by a body wave traveling from shoulders to toes, then quick footwork—moves clean and sharp, silver hair flying under neon lights, leather jacket flapping in the wind, she keeps rapping while dancing: [Rap Lyrics] 'Legs nimble, speed never slow, my lyrics carved in time! You play on phones, I play the beat, eighty years of life written in this verse!' (Tempo quickens, tone intensifies) Low-angle shots + 360-degree环绕 shots capture her cool, edgy dance moves. 11-15 seconds: Climactic ending, the grandmother spins sharply, silver hair arcing through the air, faces the camera and makes a 'shush' gesture with her finger, then brings the mic close to her lips, singing the final line in a low, magnetic voice: [Real Lyrics] 'Time never defeats a beauty, I've just traded for a different kind of youth...' (Slow tempo, heartfelt, lingering finish) Camera slowly pushes into a close-up of her eyes, crow's feet telling stories, gaze still sharp yet tinged with warmth, BGM cuts abruptly at the peak, frame freezes on her cool yet gentle smile, with vignette + neon purple glow. Sound effects: Powerful BGM beats, rap rhythm, rustling clothes, footsteps, mic reverb. BGM: Trap electronic + 808 heavy drums, rhythm shifting from intense to a soft finish. prompt_zh: 16:9横屏，街头说唱MV风格，霓虹紫蓝冷色调，燃炸酷飒氛围。 0-3秒：中景推进，城市街头夜景霓虹闪烁，一位80岁银发老太太站在涂鸦墙前，满头银白短发利落背头型，方脸轮廓分明，剑眉斜飞入鬓，眼神凌厉如电，眼角皱纹如岁月勋章，嘴角上扬露出自信笑容，身穿黑色皮衣外套内搭白色印花T恤（胸前"YOLO"黑色大字）+黑色工装裤+白色高帮球鞋，脖子上挂着金色粗条项链，手腕戴银色手镯，双手举起麦克风，BGM强劲鼓点响起，老太太眼神一凛，嘴唇张开开始Rap。 3-7秒：中景+特写切换，老太太开始说唱，节奏感极强，银发随着点头动作飞扬，她一只手握麦克风，另一只手配合节奏做出手势——食指指向镜头、手掌上下切分节奏、比出嘻哈手势，动作行云流水，眼神犀利直视镜头，皱纹在表情中生动跳跃，嘴唇快速开合吐出歌词： 【Rap歌词】"八十岁的腿，比你们还能跳！银发飘飘，这是我的骄傲！别说我老，我的Flow比你还妙，你们玩说唱的时候，我还在听disco！"（语速快、节奏强、态度狠） 镜头快速剪辑：面部特写、手部动作、全身摇摆、侧面剪影，配合BGM卡点。 7-11秒：舞蹈段落，镜头拉远展示全身，老太太开始跳舞——先是经典的嘻哈bounce弹跳，然后是一个利落的街舞freeze定格，接着身体波浪从肩膀传导到脚尖，再接一个快速脚步workout，动作干净利落，银发在霓虹灯下飞舞，皮衣外套随风飘动，她一边跳一边继续Rap： 【Rap歌词】"腿脚利索，速度不慢，我的歌词，刻在时间！你们玩手机，我玩节拍，八十年人生，写进这verse！"（节奏加快、语气更强） 镜头低角度仰拍+360度环绕拍摄，捕捉老太太酷飒的舞姿。 11-15秒：高潮收尾，老太太一个帅气的转身，银发在空中甩出弧线，面对镜头用手指比出"嘘"的手势， 后嘴唇靠近麦克风，用低沉磁性的声音唱出最后一句： 【现实歌词】"岁月从不败美人，我只是换了一种青春..."（慢节奏、深情、收尾余韵） 镜头缓缓推进特写老太太的眼睛，眼角的皱纹都是故事，眼神依然犀利又带着一丝慈祥，BGM在最高潮处戛然而止，画面定格于老太太酷飒又带点温柔的微笑，暗角+霓虹紫光晕染。 音效：BGM强劲鼓点、Rap节奏、衣服摩擦声、脚步声、麦克风回响。 BGM：Trap电子乐+808重型鼓点，节奏从强劲到舒缓收尾。 禁止：任何文字、字幕、LOGO或水印。

prompt: Massive humanoid mech collapsing mid-battle — pilot must escape from inside as the structure fails around them. Interior cockpit, alarms blaring, mech losing balance. Impact, mech hits the ground, violent shock through the cockpit. System failure, panels exploding, sparks filling the space. Escape attempt: pilot unstrapping while the mech tilts further. Structural shift: internal walls bending, pathways deforming. Near-crush: a bulkhead slams down just behind them. Fire burst: explosion blocks the main exit. Alternate route: pilot climbing through damaged internal structure. Collapse chain: limbs tearing off, structure breaking apart. Final jump: pilot ejects just before total collapse. End: mech slamming down behind in pieces.
prompt_zh: 巨型人形机甲在战斗中崩塌——驾驶员必须在结构瓦解之际从内部逃生。 驾驶舱内警报轰鸣，机甲失去平衡。冲击之下，机甲轰然倒地，驾驶舱剧烈震荡。系统失灵，面板爆裂，火花四溅。逃生尝试：驾驶员在机甲进一步倾斜时解开安全带。结构变形：内部舱壁弯曲，通道扭曲。千钧一发：一道隔板在身后猛然砸下。火焰爆发：爆炸封堵了主出口。另寻出路：驾驶员攀爬过受损的内部结构。连锁崩塌：肢体撕裂，结构崩解。最后一跃：驾驶员在机甲彻底坍塌前弹射而出。结局：机甲碎裂着砸落在身后。

prompt: FORMAT: 8s / continuous shot/first-person perspective / high intensity.  CAMERA: Handheld FPV-style camera, aggressive forward motion, natural shake, slight motion blur, dynamic exposure shifts.  SCENE: Wide open green valley surrounded by tall mountains, bright daylight, soft wind moving the grass naturally.  ACTION: At the center of the field, a small floating orb glows with intense red energy. The orb pulses slowly at first. As the camera rushes forward, the orb suddenly expands in brightness - energy starts leaking outward in unstable waves.  At 2s mark: The orb violently destabilizes - releasing a massive burst of red plasma-like energy. Shockwave spreads across the grass, bending and flattening it outward in a circular pattern.  Particles: Glowing red fragments, sparks, and energy streaks shoot outward in all directions with realistic speed and decay.  Environment interaction: Grass reacts dynamically to the explosion, dust and debris lift into the air, subtle ground distortion  CAMERA REACTION: The camera operator instinctively raises their hand slightly (visible in frame), shielding from the blast while still moving forward.  FINAL MOMENT: The orb collapses into a dense core of light, flickering violently, leaving residual energy trails in the air.  STYLE: cinematic realism, natural lighting, physically plausible motion, no slow motion, no stylization  SOUND DESIGN (optional): deep bass shockwave, energy crackle, air displacement, no music

prompt: Ultra-cinematic fantasy sequence featuring a massive dragon emerging in a mountainous landscape at dusk.  0–2s: Wide establishing shot — a lone figure stands in a vast rocky valley, distant mountains under a darkening sky, wind blowing dust and mist.  2–4s: Subtle movement — shadows shift across the cliffs, a deep rumble echoes, tension builds.  4–6s: Reveal — a gigantic dragon rises from behind the mountains, wings unfolding slowly, silhouette massive against the sky.  6–8s: Close-up — the dragon’s head lowers, glowing eyes locking forward, smoke drifting from its nostrils.  8–10s: Power moment — wings beat heavily, creating strong wind gusts, debris and dust swirling violently across the ground.  10–12s: Fire build — the dragon inhales deeply, chest glowing from within, heat distortion visible in the air.  12–14s: Fire release — a massive stream of fire erupts forward, lighting the environment in intense orange glow, flames spreading outward.  14–15s: Final shot — dragon stands tall, wings partially open, smoke and embers drifting, dominant and unstoppable presence.  Camera: cinematic wide shots, slow push-ins, dramatic scale emphasis, slight handheld vibration during impacts.  Environment: rocky valley, mountains, dust, wind, atmospheric haze.  Lighting: dusk tones shifting to intense fire glow, high contrast, volumetric light through smoke.  Style: ultra-cinematic realism, epic fantasy tone, massive scale, fire and particle VFX, no text, no overlays, stable proportions without stretch.

prompt: Concept: A humorous lion grooming transformation video featuring an ultra-realistic black lion inside a luxury animal styling studio. The tone is polished and premium but subtly ridiculous, like high-end salon content made for viral pet entertainment. Environment: An elegant boutique grooming lounge with matte black counters, warm vanity bulbs, soft mirror reflections, polished metal tools, and a clean editorial backdrop. The room feels upscale and cinematic rather than like a standard pet salon. A soft beauty-ring glow wraps around the subject, creating glossy highlights on the lion’s fur and tools. Main Subject: A hyper-realistic black lion with deep charcoal fur, a dense textured mane, powerful facial structure, expressive amber eyes, and extremely detailed whiskers. The lion wears a rich dark emerald grooming cape fastened around the neck. Its mane is being transformed into an intentionally comedic but perfectly executed rounded blunt bowl-cut style with an absurdly neat salon finish. Visual Language: Macro beauty shots, ultra-detailed close-ups, alternating between frontal portrait view, side profile, and overhead grooming angles. Shallow depth of field, clean focus pulls, precise autofocus tracking on the lion’s eyes, mane texture, scissors, and comb. Realistic salon tools include a metal comb, mist spray bottle, professional shears, thinning scissors, and a handheld dryer. Look and Feel: Bright luxury lighting, crisp clean aesthetic, tactile fur detail, premium grooming-commercial energy mixed with comedy. The overall style should feel realistic, pristine, and oddly satisfying, with a subtle ASMR grooming mood. 4K, ultra-detailed, sharp texture rendering, believable salon atmosphere. Sequence: Opening: The black lion sits calmly in the styling chair wearing the emerald cape, mane slightly overgrown, fluffy, and uneven. A human groomer’s hand enters frame and slowly lifts the messy mane with a fine comb, brushing upward through the thick fur. The strands separate naturally with soft rustling and tactile movement. Transition. Moistening Pass: From the side angle, a delicate mist is sprayed across the top and front of the lion’s mane. Tiny droplets catch the light. The thick black fur darkens, clumps slightly, and settles into a sleek damp texture as the lion remains still and dignified. Transition. Structural Cut: Overhead angle. A comb lifts a section of the damp mane, and sharp professional scissors remove the excess in one clean, deliberate line. The trim feels precise and intentional, with crisp satisfying snips and visible chunks of dark fur falling away. Transition. Softening the Shape: Front-facing close-up. Thinning shears work quickly across the front edge and sides of the mane, subtly softening the heavy cut. The movement is fast and delicate, producing a rapid series of light salon snips while the lion stares forward with regal seriousness. Transition. Blow-Dry: Side profile. Warm air from a dryer pushes through the dark fur, making it billow and expand into the finished bowl shape. The strands dance in the airflow. Closing: The final perfectly round bowl-cut mane is revealed. The lion looks directly into the lens with a stoic, kingly expression. Screen fades to black.
prompt_zh: 概念：一支幽默的狮子美容变装视频，主角是一只超写实的黑色雄狮，身处豪华宠物造型工作室。整体基调精致高端但略带荒诞，像是高端沙龙内容为病毒式宠物娱乐而制作。环境：优雅的精品美容休息室，配有哑光黑色柜台、温暖的美容灯、柔和的镜面反射、抛光金属工具以及干净利落的编辑背景。房间感觉高档且充满电影感，而非普通宠物沙龙。柔美的美容环灯包裹着主体，在狮子的毛发和工具上形成光泽高光。主体：一只超写实的黑色雄狮，拥有深炭色皮毛、浓密有纹理的鬃毛、强壮的面部结构、富有表现力的琥珀色眼睛以及极其细致的胡须。狮子颈部系着一件深翠绿色的美容披风。它的鬃毛正在被改造成一个故意搞笑但完美执行的圆润钝感锅盖头造型，带有荒谬整洁的沙龙完成度。视觉语言：微距美妆镜头、超细节特写，交替使用正面肖像视角、侧面轮廓和俯视美容角度。浅景深、清晰的焦点切换、精准的自动对焦追踪狮子的眼睛、鬃毛纹理、剪刀和梳子。逼真的沙龙工具包括金属梳、喷雾瓶、专业剪刀、打薄剪和手持吹风机。外观与感觉：明亮的奢华灯光、清晰干净的美学、触感细腻的皮毛细节、高端美容商业广告能量与喜剧感结合。整体风格应感觉逼真、纯净且莫名满足，带有微妙的ASMR美容氛围。4K、超细节、锐利纹理渲染、可信的沙龙氛围。序列：开场：黑色雄狮平静地坐在造型椅上，身披翠绿色披风，鬃毛略显过长、蓬松且不均匀。一只人类美容师的手进入画面，用细齿梳慢慢抬起凌乱的鬃毛，向上梳理浓密的毛发。发丝自然分离，伴随轻柔的沙沙声和触感动作。过渡。湿润阶段：从侧面角度，细腻的水雾喷洒在狮子鬃毛的顶部和前方。微小水滴捕捉光线。浓密的黑色皮毛变深，略微结块，沉降成光滑湿润的质感，狮子保持静止且威严。过渡。结构修剪：俯视角度。梳子抬起一段湿润的鬃毛，锋利的专业剪刀沿一条干净利落的线条剪掉多余部分。修剪感觉精准且有意图，伴随清脆满足的咔嚓声，可见的深色毛团掉落。过渡。柔化形状：正面特写。打薄剪快速修剪鬃毛的前缘和两侧，微妙地柔化厚重的剪裁。动作快速而精细，产生一系列轻快的沙龙剪发声，狮子则带着庄严的严肃直视前方。过渡。吹干：侧面轮廓。吹风机的暖风推动深色皮毛，使其蓬松膨胀成完成的锅盖形状。发丝在气流中舞动。结尾：最终完美圆润的锅盖头鬃毛展现出来。狮子以威严的王者表情直视镜头。屏幕渐黑。
prompt_en: Concept: A humorous lion grooming transformation video featuring an ultra-realistic black lion inside a luxury animal styling studio. The tone is polished and premium but subtly ridiculous, like high-end salon content made for viral pet entertainment. Environment: An elegant boutique grooming lounge with matte black counters, warm vanity bulbs, soft mirror reflections, polished metal tools, and a clean editorial backdrop. The room feels upscale and cinematic rather than like a standard pet salon. A soft beauty-ring glow wraps around the subject, creating glossy highlights on the lion’s fur and tools. Main Subject: A hyper-realistic black lion with deep charcoal fur, a dense textured mane, powerful facial structure, expressive amber eyes, and extremely detailed whiskers. The lion wears a rich dark emerald grooming cape fastened around the neck. Its mane is being transformed into an intentionally comedic but perfectly executed rounded blunt bowl-cut style with an absurdly neat salon finish. Visual Language: Macro beauty shots, ultra-detailed close-ups, alternating between frontal portrait view, side profile, and overhead grooming angles. Shallow depth of field, clean focus pulls, precise autofocus tracking on the lion’s eyes, mane texture, scissors, and comb. Realistic salon tools include a metal comb, mist spray bottle, professional shears, thinning scissors, and a handheld dryer. Look and Feel: Bright luxury lighting, crisp clean aesthetic, tactile fur detail, premium grooming-commercial energy mixed with comedy. The overall style should feel realistic, pristine, and oddly satisfying, with a subtle ASMR grooming mood. 4K, ultra-detailed, sharp texture rendering, believable salon atmosphere. Sequence: Opening: The black lion sits calmly in the styling chair wearing the emerald cape, mane slightly overgrown, fluffy, and uneven. A human groomer’s hand enters frame and slowly lifts the messy mane with a fine comb, brushing upward through the thick fur. The strands separate naturally with soft rustling and tactile movement. Transition. Moistening Pass: From the side angle, a delicate mist is sprayed across the top and front of the lion’s mane. Tiny droplets catch the light. The thick black fur darkens, clumps slightly, and settles into a sleek damp texture as the lion remains still and dignified. Transition. Structural Cut: Overhead angle. A comb lifts a section of the damp mane, and sharp professional scissors remove the excess in one clean, deliberate line. The trim feels precise and intentional, with crisp satisfying snips and visible chunks of dark fur falling away. Transition. Softening the Shape: Front-facing close-up. Thinning shears work quickly across the front edge and sides of the mane, subtly softening the heavy cut. The movement is fast and delicate, producing a rapid series of light salon snips while the lion stares forward with regal seriousness. Transition. Blow-Dry: Side profile. Warm air from a dryer pushes through the dark fur, making it billow and expand into the finished bowl shape. The strands dance in the airflow. Closing: The final perfectly round bowl-cut mane is revealed. The lion looks directly into the lens with a stoic, kingly expression. Screen fades to black.

prompt: [0-2s] A blonde/orange cat naps on the couch. The robot vacuum bumps into the couch leg. The cat looks down. Annoyed. [2-4s] The cat drops a paw and pushes the vacuum away. It spins, recalculates, comes right back. Bumps the couch again. [4-6s] The cat jumps down. Sits directly on top of it. The vacuum tries to move. Can't. Wheels spinning. Going nowhere. [6-8s] The vacuum reverses hard. The cat slides off the back. Lands on its butt. Dignity gone. [8-10s] The cat chases it. The vacuum dodges around a chair leg. Then another. The cat crashes into the chair. [10-12s] The cat sits in the corner licking its paw pretending nothing happened. The vacuum bumps into it one more time. On purpose.  The cat stalks the vacuum across the room. Low. Predator mode. The vacuum is heading for the kitchen.  In the kitchen, vacuum wants to get on the dock and cat knows it. The cat jumps down. Sits right in front of the dock.  The vacuum tries left. The cat slides left. Tries right. The cat slides right. No way through. a woman enters the kitchen and says "oh dear, it's running out of battery" and asks the cat to "get out of the way" so vacuum can enter dock. she places the vacuum and says "let him do his job" Click. The vacuum docks. Light turns green. The cat looks at it with anger and throws a paw, the vacuum responds with a beep.
prompt_zh: [0-2秒] 一只金毛橘猫在沙发上打盹。扫地机器人撞到沙发腿。猫低头看了看。一脸不爽。 [2-4秒] 猫伸出一只爪子把机器人推开。机器人转了个圈，重新计算路径，又回来了。再次撞上沙发腿。 [4-6秒] 猫跳下沙发。直接坐在机器人上面。机器人试图移动。动不了。轮子空转。寸步难行。 [6-8秒] 机器人猛地后退。猫从它背上滑下来。一屁股坐在地上。尊严尽失。 [8-10秒] 猫追着机器人跑。机器人绕过椅子腿。又绕过一个。猫一头撞在椅子上。 [10-12秒] 猫蹲在角落舔爪子，假装什么都没发生。机器人又撞了它一下。故意的。  猫压低身子，以捕猎姿态悄悄跟踪机器人穿过房间。机器人正朝厨房驶去。 厨房里，机器人想回充电座，猫心知肚明。猫跳下来。直接蹲在充电座前。 机器人想往左绕。猫往左一滑。想往右绕。猫往右一滑。根本过不去。 一位女士走进厨房，说道：“哎呀，它快没电了。”然后让猫“让开”，好让机器人能回充电座。她把机器人放好，说：“让它干活吧。” 咔嗒一声。机器人对接成功。指示灯变绿。猫愤怒地盯着它，挥了一爪子，机器人回了一声“哔”。

prompt: The Celestial Fracture: A Supernova Strike  A hyper-realistic, high-octane cinematic video that demands absolute attention. A colossal, biomechanical Stained-Glass Cerberus—its internal skeleton forged from churning, liquid tungsten—violently crashes upward through the vaulted floor of a floating, neo-gothic cathedral suspended in the chaotic rings of a dying star. The breach sends explosive, slow-motion shockwaves of pulverized ancient marble and iridescent glass shards high into the localized anti-gravity field.  Riding the apex of the center hound's massive skull is a fiercely athletic Valkyrie, armored in polished obsidian and wielding a colossal scythe made of pure, white-hot plasma. Instead of bracing for the catastrophic impact, she harnesses the beast's violent upward momentum to launch into a spectacular, gravity-defying reverse-somersault execution strike, swinging the glowing plasma scythe overhead in a blinding, lethal arc directly toward the abyss.  The Twist: Suddenly, an unexpected twist: as the Cerberus reaches the peak of its breach, the millions of suspended, shattered stained-glass fragments violently ignite with blinding, golden solar energy. The shards instantly coalesce and mutate into a massive swarm of glowing, translucent Celestial Manta Rays, their wings sharp as obsidian scalpels, erupting from the debris and soaring like kinetic missiles all around the suspended warrior.  The camera abandons a traditional wide shot for a relentless, fast-paced reverse-tracking snap-zoom. It spirals violently backward through the deadly storm of glowing glass manta rays, narrowly dodging their razor-sharp wings, before whipping 180 degrees to lock into a first-person POV directly over the Valkyrie's shoulder just as her plasma scythe connects with the Cerberus’s tungsten spine with catastrophic force. The blinding golden light of the dying star is dramatically pierced by a sudden, jagged shockwave of void-black anti-matter ripping across the nebula.  Audio Profile: Audio features the deafening, apocalyptic crunch of shattering celestial architecture, the high-pitched, singing whine of the plasma scythe cutting the atmosphere, the terrifyingly beautiful, chaotic chime of a million glass wings slicing the air, and a soaring, high-tempo operatic choir layered with a heavy synth-bass crescendo. This auditory chaos cuts abruptly to a vacuum-sealed, ringing silence the exact millisecond the black anti-matter shockwave detonates.
prompt_zh: 天裂：超新星一击。一部超写实、高能、令人目不转睛的电影级视频。一只巨大的生物机械彩色玻璃地狱三头犬——其内部骨架由翻涌的液态钨锻造而成——猛然向上撞穿一座漂浮的新哥特式大教堂的拱顶地板，这座教堂悬浮在一颗垂死恒星的混乱星环中。这次撞击将慢动作的爆炸性冲击波——粉碎的古代大理石和虹彩玻璃碎片——高高抛入局部的反重力场中。中间犬首的巨大颅骨顶端，一位身披抛光黑曜石战甲、手持一柄纯白热等离子巨镰的凶猛女武神正骑乘其上。她并未准备迎接灾难性的冲击，而是利用巨兽狂暴的上升动量，腾空跃起，完成一记惊世骇俗、无视重力的后空翻处决斩击，将炽热的等离子镰刀在头顶划出一道致盲的致命弧线，直指下方的深渊。转折：突然，意外发生：当三头犬达到撞击的顶点时，数百万悬浮的破碎彩色玻璃碎片猛然燃起刺目的金色太阳能量。这些碎片瞬间凝聚并变异成一大群发光的半透明天界蝠鲼，它们的翅膀锋利如黑曜石手术刀，从碎片中喷涌而出，像动能导弹一样环绕着悬空的战士呼啸飞过。镜头放弃了传统的广角拍摄，转而采用无情的快速反向追踪快切变焦。它猛烈地螺旋后退，穿过致命的发光玻璃蝠鲼风暴，险险避开它们剃刀般的翅膀，然后猛地旋转180度，锁定为第一人称视角，正好越过女武神的肩膀，此时她的等离子镰刀以毁灭性的力量击中三头犬的钨脊柱。垂死恒星刺目的金光被一道突然出现的、锯齿状的虚空黑色反物质冲击波戏剧性地刺穿，这道冲击波撕裂了整个星云。音频：音频包括震耳欲聋、末日般的星界建筑碎裂声，等离子镰刀切割大气时尖锐的歌唱般呼啸，百万玻璃翅膀划破空气时恐怖而美丽的混乱叮当声，以及高亢激昂的歌剧合唱与沉重的合成贝斯渐强交织。这听觉的混乱在黑色反物质冲击波引爆的精确毫秒间戛然而止，化作真空密封般的寂静嗡鸣。
